sectionsUnavailable: Direct Clinical Annotator sample-report rows have not been captured.
Full ACMG/AMP evidence-code worksheet and submitter rationale text were not supplied.
Personal phenotype, family history, confirmatory laboratory testing, penetrance, and clinician interpretation were not supplied.
Sibling Healthcare Pro rows are included only as observed output structure, not as personal clinical-annotation evidence.
reportOverview.plainEnglishScope: This report explains supplied clinical-annotation lookup rows and sibling sample-output structure in plain English. It reports database assertions as supplied evidence, not as a personal diagnosis or medical instruction.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The supplied local lookup says this BRCA1 variant has a ClinVar-submitted germline classification of pathogenic for a hereditary cancer condition, with review status reported as criteria provided by multiple submitters with no conflicts. The fixture does not include phenotype, family history, confirmatory testing, penetrance, or medical actionability context.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: This is an externally supplied database assertion about a variant-condition relationship. It does not diagnose the person, measure overall cancer risk, or say what medical action to take without qualified review and clinical context.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The supplied lookup row identifies HFE rs1800562 and provides condition-associated interpretation context, but it does not include penetrance, iron studies, family history, diagnosis, or medical actionability.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The row can be used to explain that a public variant identifier and database context were found. It cannot say whether the person has a condition or needs care because the clinical context needed for that interpretation was not supplied.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The fixture does not include ACMG/AMP evidence codes, submitter rationale, expert-panel review, assertion date, condition specificity, segregation evidence, functional evidence, or population-frequency thresholds.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: The report should not apply classification rules on its own. Missing evidence-code details are listed so the reader can see what would be needed for a professional interpretation.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The fixture does not include symptoms, family history, ancestry calibration, age, sex, laboratory confirmation, clinician interpretation, or direct Clinical Annotator sample rows. Sibling Healthcare Pro rows are available only as output-structure examples.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Clinical annotations need personal and laboratory context before they can be used for healthcare decisions. This package therefore reports the missing context instead of filling it in.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The cover and table of contents identify a Healthcare Pro sample report with sections for STAT Alerts, Increased Risk Detected, Medications (Pharmacogenomics), Rare Diseases, No Increased Risk Detected, and Analysis Alerts. This row captures sample-report structure only and does not prove a local Healthcare Pro report was generated.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Observed sibling Healthcare Pro sample-report structure only. Keep this separate from local clinical-annotation evidence; it is not a personal diagnosis, disease-risk estimate, pathogenicity classification, carrier-status call, penetrance estimate, family-member risk estimate, medication guidance, screening guidance, diagnostic-testing guidance, reproductive guidance, treatment, or actionability conclusion.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample report labels Hirschsprung Disease as Increased Risk Detected and ties the row to a RET mutation described as IVS 1 +9277 and +9349 relative to MET. This is a sample-person rare-disease risk row only; local output must not infer diagnosis, symptoms, imaging need, or referral need.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Observed sibling Healthcare Pro sample-report structure only. Keep this separate from local clinical-annotation evidence; it is not a personal diagnosis, disease-risk estimate, pathogenicity classification, carrier-status call, penetrance estimate, family-member risk estimate, medication guidance, screening guidance, diagnostic-testing guidance, reproductive guidance, treatment, or actionability conclusion.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample report labels Thrombophilia as Carrier and states the sample has one copy of the Factor V R2 mutation in F5, distinct from Factor V Leiden. This is sample carrier-status structure only; local output must not infer personal thrombophilia carrier status or clotting risk.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Observed sibling Healthcare Pro sample-report structure only. Keep this separate from local clinical-annotation evidence; it is not a personal diagnosis, disease-risk estimate, pathogenicity classification, carrier-status call, penetrance estimate, family-member risk estimate, medication guidance, screening guidance, diagnostic-testing guidance, reproductive guidance, treatment, or actionability conclusion.

resultRows.geneticAnalysis: The sample report labels Hemochromatosis as Carrier and ties the carrier row to a single HFE2 G320V mutation. This is sample carrier-status structure only; local output must not infer iron overload, carrier status, family risk, monitoring, or treatment.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: Observed sibling Healthcare Pro sample-report structure only. Keep this separate from local clinical-annotation evidence; it is not a personal diagnosis, disease-risk estimate, pathogenicity classification, carrier-status call, penetrance estimate, family-member risk estimate, medication guidance, screening guidance, diagnostic-testing guidance, reproductive guidance, treatment, or actionability conclusion.

clinicalAnnotationSummary.plainEnglishMeaning: Supplied ClinVar and dbSNP lookup rows can help explain what public databases say about selected variants, review status, and identifiers. Sibling Healthcare Pro rows show adjacent clinical-report structure only. Neither source by itself proves a diagnosis, personal risk level, penetrance, carrier status, or medical action.
unsupportedClaims: carrier-status call from sibling sample rows
medication, screening, diagnostic-testing, reproductive, lifestyle, or treatment recommendations
clinicalAnnotationSummary.professionalReview: A qualified genetics professional or clinician should review any clinical use together with confirmatory testing, personal and family history, phenotype, ancestry, and current guideline context.

genotypeSummary.effect: The sample report uses this RET row for a Hirschsprung Disease increased-risk sample label.
genotypeSummary.phenotype: Observed sample content only; do not infer local Hirschsprung Disease risk, diagnosis, symptoms, imaging, or referral need. This is Clinical Annotator sibling sample output-structure evidence only, not local diagnosis, disease risk, pathogenicity classification, carrier-status call, penetrance, family-member risk, screening, diagnostic testing, medication guidance, reproductive guidance, treatment, or actionability evidence.

genotypeSummary.effect: The sample report labels the sample as a Factor V R2 carrier and distinguishes it from Factor V Leiden.
genotypeSummary.phenotype: Observed sample content only; do not infer local thrombophilia carrier status or clotting risk. This is Clinical Annotator sibling sample output-structure evidence only, not local diagnosis, disease risk, pathogenicity classification, carrier-status call, penetrance, family-member risk, screening, diagnostic testing, medication guidance, reproductive guidance, treatment, or actionability evidence.

genotypeSummary.effect: The sample report labels the sample as a Hemochromatosis carrier due to HFE2 G320V.
genotypeSummary.phenotype: Observed sample content only; do not infer local hemochromatosis carrier status, iron overload, monitoring, or treatment need. This is Clinical Annotator sibling sample output-structure evidence only, not local diagnosis, disease risk, pathogenicity classification, carrier-status call, penetrance, family-member risk, screening, diagnostic testing, medication guidance, reproductive guidance, treatment, or actionability evidence.

genotypeSummary.genotype: no ambiguity; complete data; all listed conditions analyzed in the sample
genotypeSummary.effect: The sample report states its own analysis completeness and lack-of-ambiguity alerts on the final page.
genotypeSummary.phenotype: Observed sample quality context only; do not claim local completeness without equivalent local quality evidence. This is Clinical Annotator sibling sample output-structure evidence only, not local diagnosis, disease risk, pathogenicity classification, carrier-status call, penetrance, family-member risk, screening, diagnostic testing, medication guidance, reproductive guidance, treatment, or actionability evidence.

genotypeSummary.genotype: direct Clinical Annotator sample report, ACMG/AMP evidence-code worksheet, submitter rationale, expert-panel review, assertion date, condition specificity, phenotype fit, family history, segregation, functional evidence, confirmatory testing, penetrance, clinician review, and genetic counselor review unavailable
genotypeSummary.effect: The local fixture intentionally omits the professional interpretation and evidence worksheet needed for clinical actionability.
genotypeSummary.phenotype: Mark diagnosis, disease risk, pathogenicity classification, carrier-status calls, penetrance, family-member risk, screening, diagnostic testing, medication guidance, reproductive guidance, treatment, and actionability unavailable instead of inferring them.

uncertainty: No calibrated personal disease probability, penetrance estimate, pathogenicity probability, carrier-status model, or actionability model was supplied.
A database classification is not the same thing as a personal diagnosis.
Sibling Healthcare Pro sample rows are observed report-structure examples only and should not be interpreted as local clinical findings.
Review status and submitter information can change as databases receive updated submissions.
missingInputs: Full ClinVar accession/version and assertion date fields
ACMG/AMP criteria worksheet and submitter rationale
Expert-panel review status beyond the supplied row
Phenotype, symptoms, family history, ancestry calibration, age, sex, and confirmatory laboratory testing
limitations: This fixture uses selected derived annotation rows and sibling sample-output rows only; raw genome data is not included.
The report does not create a new ACMG/AMP classification and does not upgrade any supplied database assertion.

The report does not diagnose disease, estimate personal risk, call carrier status, or recommend medication, screening, diagnostic testing, reproductive decisions, lifestyle changes, treatment, or actionability.
Clinical use requires qualified professional review and confirmatory evidence outside this local test fixture.
